overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bathroom from Cyberpunk 2077. The player character slowly moves through the shower area, examines the fixtures and toiletries, and approaches the toilet, revealing neon-lit mirror displays and an interaction prompt.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment shower area with tiled walls

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the shower area toward the back wall, examining the tiled surfaces and fixtures

entered.detail: wall covered in white square tiles with cyan neon lighting reflection
dark wooden bench with toiletries placed on top
metal rack mounted on the wall holding a white towel
white towel hanging from the rack
tall vertical shower fixture with multiple knobs and showerheads
small white shelf mounted on the back wall
three bottles including a purple pump bottle and green container

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, cyan-lit bathroom shower area. The camera moves forward past a wooden bench with toiletries and a towel rack, approaching a back wall with a small shelf holding bottles. The white tiled walls and artificial neon lighting create a distinct cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bathroom main area with sink and mirror

events.description: camera pans left to reveal the sink and toilet area from the shower corner
digital display on mirror becomes visible with cyan cyberpunk interface elements

agents.ego_description: turning to survey the bathroom interior, focusing on the mirror with digital display and the toilet area

entered.detail: large rectangular mirror above the sink with glowing cyan digital overlay
holographic cyan text and graphics displayed on the mirror surface
white ceramic wall-mounted sink with silver faucet
shelf under the mirror holding various bathroom items
white toilet with the lid up, positioned against the right wall
wall-mounted holder with folded toilet paper
green-tinted metal grid screen separating the shower area

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal the main bathroom area, transitioning from the shower corner to show the sink, toilet, and a large mirror displaying cyan holographic text. The digital interface on the mirror and the metal grid partition add to the cyberpunk aesthetic of the small apartment bathroom.

events.description: camera slows and lowers to focus on the toilet bowl
game interaction prompt 'Flush' appears at the bottom of the screen

agents.ego_description: approaching the toilet for close inspection, triggering the flush interaction prompt in the game interface

segments.scene_description: The camera moves closer to the toilet, with the sink and mirror exiting the frame as the view narrows to focus on the toilet bowl. The lighting becomes darker and more focused, culminating in a close-up view of the toilet interior with a game interaction prompt appearing on screen.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, cyan-lit cyberpunk bathroom that shifts from a general exploration of the shower area to a focused close-up of a specific fixture. It begins by gliding forward through the shower space, passing a wooden bench and towel rack toward a small shelf of toiletries against white tiled walls. As the camera turns left, the view expands to reveal the main bathroom area, transitioning past a sink and a large mirror displaying glowing cyan holographic text. The scene then narrows its focus, moving away from the digital interface and metal partitions to approach the toilet. Finally, the lighting becomes darker and more concentrated as the camera closes in on the toilet bowl, culminating in the appearance of a game interaction prompt.
